title: androrchis × colemanii
intro: Androrchis × colemanii, also known as the Coleman's Orchid, is a hybrid plant resulting from the cross between Dactylorhiza maculata and Orchis mascula. The medicinal properties of the Coleman's Orchid include its ability to treat various health issues, including inflammation, fever, and respiratory problems, due to its presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits associated with the plant include its antioxidant, antimicrobial, and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to boost the immune system, reduce oxidative stress, and alleviate symptoms of certain diseases. Herbal preparations of the Coleman's Orchid can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various health issues, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
